name: howdy pillar mob au
description:
mob howdy is the butler for wally. he is around 8ft tall and has 4 arms and legs. he always has a cold look and is missing his right eye like all the others, as it being a 'family thing.' (sorry if this sucks-)

Hey guys! Edit from around 2 years later? I'm unsure. I fixed up some things so hopefully it's a bit better now!!
